zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Érard II de Brienne於1130年6月1日出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，他的父親Comte Gautier II de Brienne35歲，母親Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont29歲。他於1166年之前與Agnès de Montfaucon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年2月8日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年60歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內蒙--德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Érard II de Brienne于1130年6月1日出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧时，他的父亲Comte Gautier II de Brienne35岁，母亲Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont29岁。他于1166年之前与Agnès de Montfaucon结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1191年2月8日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年60岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內蒙--德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Érard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ēra ‘honour’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’; name of a 7th-century saint, allegedly of Irish origin, who served as a missionary bishop in the Regensburg area of Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Érard II de Brienne was born on 1 June 1130, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, his father, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, was 35 and his mother, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, was 29. He married Agnès de Montfaucon before 1166. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 February 1191, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 60, and was buried in Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Érard II de Brienne est né le 1 juin 1130, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Montfaucon avant 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1191, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Érard II de Brienne am 1. Juni 1130 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Gautier II de Brienne 35 und seine Mutter Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont 29. Er hat vor 1166 Agnès de Montfaucon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1191 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina und wurde in Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Érard II de Brienne è nato il il 1 giugno 1130 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Montfaucon prima del 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Érard II de Brienneが1130年6月1日にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Comte Gautier II de Brienneは35歳，母Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémontは29歳であった。1166年以前にAgnès de Montfauconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年2月8日にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで60歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンモンティエル-エン-ダーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Érard II de Brienne(이)가 1130년 6월 1일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Gautier II de Brienne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1166년 이전 Agnès de Montfaucon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 2월 8일 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 몽에--더에 묻혔다.

mn.1 June 1130–8 February 1191: 1130 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 1–1191 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 8

pt.1 June 1130–8 February 1191: 1 de junho de 1130–8 de fevereiro de 1191
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Érard II de Brienne nasceu em 1 de junho de 1130, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Montfaucon antes 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1191, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Érard II de Brienne родился 1 июня 1130 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Gautier II de Brienne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Montfaucon перед 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1191 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности монтиир-ен-дир, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.1 June 1130–8 February 1191: 1 de junio de 1130–8 de febrero de 1191
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Érard II de Brienne nació el 1 de junio de 1130, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnès de Montfaucon antes de 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1191, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Montier-en-Der, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
